block.createcompletelycreate.block_expel: Uses _rotational force_ to generate blocks from two ingredients.
Place _block ingredients_ on the _side_ and _below_ the extruder, and a _catalyst_ on _top_. Outputs can be extracted from _below_ via a _chute_ or collected via _right-click_.
block.createcompletelycreate.brass_block: An advanced extruder that produces _more output_ per cycle and accepts _advanced recipes_.
Place _block ingredients_ on the _side_ and _below_ the extruder, and a _catalyst_ on _top_. Outputs can be extracted from _below_ via a _chute_ or collected via _right-click_.
Can process recipes that require _advanced extruding_, such as _obsidian_ and _snow_.
